title: Tag Validator
hints: Start by ensuring the snippet begins with an opening tag and ends with a matching closing tag. Use a stack to track nested tags.
When encountering '<', check if it starts a valid tag or CDATA. Valid tags must have uppercase names; CDATA ignores content until ']]>'.
Push opening tags onto the stack. Pop when a closing tag matches the top. If the stack is not empty at the end or mismatches occur, it is invalid.
